description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a symmetrical facade and a flat, tiled roof. The front of the house is defined by a covered porch supported by columns, with two palm trees and a paved driveway leading up to it. Large windows line both floors, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. On one side of the house, there is a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella, suggesting a space for outdoor relaxation. The property is landscaped with several trees and includes a parking area with a car visible. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor amenities and curb appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a front porch, and a backyard pool area, surrounded by landscaping and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, two palm trees, driveway, and part of the backyard pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and symmetrical window arrangement, with landscaping visible in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and additional trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and landscaping, with the front driveway and palm trees partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, columns, and steps leading up from the driveway
